# lineItemId

**Type**

A unique identifier for the line item, that you determine.

## Declaration

```swift
string lineItemId
```

## Discussion

Maximum length: 128

The [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/lineItemId] string must be unique for each app. Using UUIDs is recommended. All line item objects have a [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/lineItemId], including:

- [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/OneTimeBuyLineItem]
- [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/RefundLineItem]
- [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/SubscriptionBuyLineItem]
title: lineItemId
